title: Cymbal Group Employee Remote Work Policy & Handbook (v2.0)
content:
Cymbal Group Remote Work Policy & Guidelines (v2.0 Update).

Welcome to the official remote work handbook for all Cymbal Group employees. This document outlines the expectations, tools, and compliance guidelines for employees working remotely or in a hybrid model. This v2.0 update introduces the international work and travel guidelines.

1. Core Working Hours
To ensure seamless collaboration, all employees are expected to be online and accessible during our core working hours of 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM EST, regardless of their physical location.

2. Home Office Equipment Reimbursement
Cymbal Group offers a one-time stipend of up to $500 USD for setting up an ergonomic home office. This covers monitors, office chairs, and desk accessories.

3. Security and Compliance
- Always connect to the corporate network using the Cymbal Secure VPN client.
- Do not perform corporate work on personal, unmanaged devices.

4. International Work & Nomad Policy (New v2.0 update)
Employees wishing to work from an international location for more than 14 consecutive calendar days must submit an HR travel request form at least 30 days prior. This is required to evaluate local tax compliance, data residency laws, and corporate insurance coverages.

title: Cymbal Group FY2027 Financial Strategy & M&A Pipeline
content:
Confidential Document: Cymbal Group FY2027 Financial Projections and Acquisition Pipeline.

This planning document details Cymbal Group's corporate expansion plans, budget allocations, and active list of acquisition targets for the upcoming fiscal year.

1. Revenue Targets and Budget Allocation
- Cymbal Group is targeting a consolidated ARR (Annual Recurring Revenue) of $450 Million USD for FY2027, representing a 32% year-over-year increase.
- Product Development and Engineering budget is allocated at $110 Million USD, focusing heavily on our Next-Gen AI Platform (Project Aether).
- Marketing and Sales expansion into EMEA is allocated at $45 Million USD.

2. M&A Strategy and Pipeline Targets
We are actively exploring acquisitions of companies that complement our retail cloud catalog:
- Target Alpha (Codename: Project Swift): An AI-driven inventory optimization platform with $5M ARR. Estimated valuation is $18M - $22M.
- Target Beta (Codename: Project Secure): A boutique security consulting and endpoint threat prevention company based in London, UK.

title: Cymbal Group Executive Compensation and Stock Option Plan
content:
Confidential Document: Executive Compensation, Stock Allocations, and Bonus Structure policies for FY2027.

1. Executive Stock Options
- Stock option grants are approved annually by the Compensation & Leadership Committee.
- Vesting schedule: 4-year vesting with a 1-year cliff, starting from the executive's official start date.
- Acceleration rules apply only in the event of a change of control (double-trigger acceleration).

2. Performance Bonuses
- Bonuses are calculated based on a combination of corporate performance (70% weight) and individual performance goals (30% weight).
- Target bonus percentages range from 20% to 50% of base salary depending on leadership level.
